title: Kerala Tikka Noodle Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired noodle bowl made with marinated chicken tikka, served over a bed of noodles and topped with a delicious kerala-style sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together curry powder, masala, and yogurt.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook the noodles according to package instructions.
In a small saucepan, heat the coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the kerala sauce and stir to combine.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of noodles on the bottom, followed by a piece of grilled chicken, and finally top with the kerala sauce.
Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions, if desired.
